## Description

What does this PR do? What problem does it solve?

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code hygiene
- [ ] CI / build / dev tooling
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Testing

- [ ] Core unit tests pass: `pnpm test:core`
- [ ] Extension unit tests pass: `pnpm test:ext`
- [ ] Manual testing done (describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing style and patterns
- [ ] I've added tests for new functionality (if applicable)
- [ ] I've updated docs (if applicable)
- [ ] I've added a changeset / bumped version (if needed)
